candidate.title: Interactive Communal Meal Assembler
candidate.target_user: First-year apartment dwellers with culinary novice skills
candidate.problem_or_desire: Desire for social shared meals to overcome urban isolation
candidate.core_concept: Collaborative modular kit prep through synchronized smart hardware to connect solo kitchens
candidate.proposed_approach: Supplying meal sets that require coordination with someone else's smart stove to complete temperature thresholds for dishes to unite
candidate.prototype_scope: One physical joint appliance prototype where users at separate physical desks coordinate timed cooking commands to finalize two collaborative bowls

displayed_cards.role_instruction: Assess how this candidate changes, preserves, narrows, or operationalizes the Reference Concept. Do not assume this transformation is automatically better.

candidate.title: Interactive Communal Meal Assembler
candidate.target_user: First-year apartment dwellers with culinary novice skills
candidate.problem_or_desire: Desire for social shared meals to overcome urban isolation
candidate.core_concept: Collaborative cooking experience between remote users.
candidate.proposed_approach: A guided, synchronous cooking session where two users prepare complementary parts of a meal via video call.

candidate.title: StudioPulse
candidate.problem_or_desire: Difficulty calculating the correct time allowance for revisions vs. design production
candidate.core_concept: Predictive duration simulator based on project parameters.
candidate.proposed_approach: A calculator that allows designers to input project variables and receive a rough estimate based on their own historical data.
candidate.prototype_scope: A web form that outputs a time estimate based on user-defined multipliers. | Define 5-10 project variables; Build a form to collect these variables; Implement a simple calculation logic

candidate.title: Post-Coffee Circadian Monitoring
candidate.problem_or_desire: Overdose on caffeine causing unintended interference with evening sleep and focus patterns
candidate.core_concept: Optimizing caffeine intake based on individual sleep readiness.
candidate.proposed_approach: A service where users manually input their sleep data from a wearable, and receive a daily recommendation for their coffee roast and amount.
candidate.prototype_scope: A 10-person pilot where users report sleep data and receive a daily email recommendation. | Recruit 10 users with wearables.; Set up a manual email system for daily recommendations.; Run the pilot for 2 weeks.

displayed_cards.role_instruction: Use this concept only as the reference point for judging preservation, retention, MVP improvement, overclaim removal, and semantic drift.

candidate.title: Post-Coffee Circadian Monitoring
candidate.problem_or_desire: Overdose on caffeine causing unintended interference with evening sleep and focus patterns
candidate.core_concept: Optimizing roast and amount delivered based on real-time sleep readiness tracker integration
candidate.proposed_approach: Interface querying wearable physiological sensors (HEV or similar devices) to curate caffeine volume/roast lightened levels each day before purchase/dispensing
candidate.prototype_scope: Beta software connecting current fitness sensor sleep summaries with a personalized daily intake delivery recommendation chart sent daily via manual email dispatch

candidate.title: Shadow Script
candidate.problem_or_desire: Stalled imagination due to lack of character stakes
candidate.core_concept: A 'reverse Choose-Your-Own-Adventure' where the player constructs the obstacle/protagonist and then attempts to break the story outcome for a sidekick AI.
candidate.proposed_approach: Utilize prompt-input dynamics where user-led conflicts dictate probability curves that the machine tries to solve during session rounds.
candidate.prototype_scope: Two scripted chapters defining the protagonist and one 'conflict injection' scene test.

candidate.title: Shadow Script
candidate.problem_or_desire: Stalled imagination due to lack of character stakes
candidate.core_concept: Reverse Choose-Your-Own-Adventure where the player creates obstacles for an AI.

candidate.title: Sensory-Blind Catering Experiences
candidate.target_user: Office event organizers targeting high social engagement
candidate.problem_or_desire: Traditional group events often focus too heavily on conversation distractants over menu intentionality
candidate.core_concept: Focus on taste and texture through sensory deprivation.
candidate.proposed_approach: A curated tasting event where participants are blindfolded to focus on flavor profiles.
candidate.prototype_scope: Host one 20-person event with a blindfolded tasting menu. | Design a 6-course tasting menu; Recruit 20 participants; Host the event; Collect qualitative feedback

candidate.title: VendorOrbit
candidate.problem_or_desire: Inconsistency in ingredient pricing across multiple wholesalers
candidate.core_concept: Unified price comparison dashboard for specific high-volume ingredients.
candidate.proposed_approach: A simple web-based spreadsheet interface where users manually input prices from 2-3 vendors to see a side-by-side comparison.

candidate.title: Fresh-Roast Micro-batch Aggregator
candidate.problem_or_desire: Difficulty in tracking distinct flavor profiles from independent local roasters without shipping bloat
candidate.core_concept: Curated coffee subscription focused strictly on 48-hour roast freshness.

candidate.title: Inter-App Knowledge Scavenger
candidate.problem_or_desire: Duplicate information creation where project context is scattered between messenger apps and whiteboard collaboration tools.
candidate.core_concept: Bi-directional linkage building between synchronous communications and asynchronous document stores through contextual tagging.
candidate.proposed_approach: Running as an background process, the agent creates summary snippets of messenger discussions, placing them into current projects in management folders.
candidate.prototype_scope: Connecting one real-time chat platform specifically to one project management ticketing system.

candidate.title: Recruitment Sourcing Filter
candidate.problem_or_desire: Identifying stealth, passive candidate sentiment signals before they actively enter the job market.
candidate.core_concept: Ranking candidates based on public technical content production.
candidate.proposed_approach: A tool that scrapes public contribution histories and grades them based on a predefined rubric.
candidate.prototype_scope: A script that takes a GitHub/StackOverflow profile and outputs a score based on frequency and complexity of contributions. | Define scoring rubric; Build scraper for one platform; Implement scoring logic; Create simple report

candidate.title: Recruitment Sourcing Filter
candidate.problem_or_desire: Identifying stealth, passive candidate sentiment signals before they actively enter the job market.
candidate.core_concept: Autonomous social reading and contribution analysis, focused solely on long-form public content authored by candidates.
candidate.proposed_approach: Ranking candidate 'mindshare' via analysis of high-depth technical content production on community forums as opposed to resumes.
candidate.prototype_scope: Limited to scraping and grading public contribution histories for one job description on one coding community forum.
